programme.title: The Reveal
programme.desc: Designer Julie Couch gives you a personal tour of her timeless Brentwood, TN home.

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.desc: Designer Christopher Kennedy invites you to step inside this mid-century modern dream.

programme.title: Farm to Table
programme.desc: Meet Nina and Brendan, who swapped sound checks for soil and left life on the road for life on a farm.

programme.title: Farm to Table
programme.desc: It’s time for hands to get dirty as Nina unearths the wonders of good soil.

programme.title: Farm to Table
programme.desc: From sowing to reaping, everything Nina and Brendon do is connected to the rhythm of the seasons.

programme.title: Farm to Table
programme.desc: Nina proves that citrus trees teach us valuable things about seasons and relationships.

programme.title: Farm to Table
programme.desc: Nina and Brendon’s walk through the dark valley leads to unforeseen miracles and joy.

programme.title: Farm to Table
programme.desc: As the Shirley family farm continues to grow, so does the community it celebrates.

programme.title: Fresh. Simple. Healthy.
programme.desc: Heather’s turning up the heat with her roasted peri peri chicken with broccolini and crispy potatoes.

programme.title: Fresh. Simple. Healthy.
programme.desc: Heather whips up a grilled shrimp chop salad and simple berry dessert.

programme.title: Fresh. Simple. Healthy.
programme.desc: Heather makes a lighter version of an old family favorite: chicken salsa verde.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.desc: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.desc: Captain Boomies joins the Paglias aboard their yacht Executive Decision for a deep-sea adventure.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.desc: Captain Boomies gets a look at the Pipe Dream - equal parts sport machine and floating celebration.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.desc: Captain Boomies tours Wharf Rat, a Bahamian-blue beauty built for fun, travel, and serious sport.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.desc: Captain Boomies meets Tom Biddix—a yachtsman who helped design the demo yacht they take for a spin.

programme.title: Buying Back Home
programme.desc: Follow couples as they return to their roots to weigh their home-buying options in their beloved hometown.

programme.title: Buying Back Home
programme.desc: Follow couples as they return to their roots to weigh their home-buying options in their beloved hometown.

programme.title: Buying Back Home
programme.desc: Follow couples as they return to their roots to weigh their home-buying options in their beloved hometown.

programme.title: Celebrity House Sitting
programme.desc: Leah heads to Dana Spinola's posh pad and NFL veteran Matt Schaub's mega mansion.

programme.title: Celebrity House Sitting
programme.desc: Leah stops by recording artist Zac Brown's wilderness retreat and TV star Toya Wright's pristine palace.

programme.title: Celebrity House Sitting
programme.desc: Leah house sits for comic and radio host Rickey Smiley and Real Housewives of Atlanta legend Phaedra Parks.

programme.title: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Danica McKellar and Julie Couch give Dolly Parton's Imagination Library a magical makeover.

programme.title: Hometown Heroes
programme.sub-title: A Tribute to The Brett Boyer Foundation
programme.desc: Julie Couch transforms the Brett Boyer Foundation headquarters into a space that radiates joy and hope.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: Darrel and Patrice of Maxam Hotels embark on an epic journey to build a tiny home resort.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: Darrel and Patrice begin construction, laying the foundation for the resort.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: The tension begins to mount as the deadline looms larger.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: It’s all hands-on deck at the resort and the team is working around the clock.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: With power finally in place, the Maxams begin to ready the resort for opening.

programme.title: Tiny Treehouse Escape
programme.desc: The town of Sodus shows up as the Maxams unveil The Finger Lakes Treehouse Resort.

programme.title: Design Science
programme.sub-title: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living
programme.desc: Designer Julie Couch transforms everything from small rooms to outdoor spaces.

programme.title: Design Science
programme.desc: Designer Julie Couch breaks down the basic formulas for successful design.

programme.sub-title: Ruby's Kitchen with a View / Pon and Garmen's Lost Living Room

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Class is officially in session as Brad and Jennifer head to three different sites to meet their student flippers.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Before taking the class on a much-needed field trip, Brad and Jennifer drop in to check each flipper's progress.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Brad and Jennifer introduce the class to Ashley, a color specialist from Glidden.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Brad and Jennifer stop by each site to see if the flippers have completed their last homework assignment.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: Graduation looms near, and the flippers are hard at work putting the finishing touches on each home.

programme.title: Flip U
programme.desc: The classmates unveil their spectacular finished homes in a final review with Brad and Jennifer.
